title: Plutarch, Moralia: Whether Virtue Can Be Taught
description: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Whether Virtue Can Be Taught.
introduction: Essay from Plutarch's Moralia: Whether Virtue Can Be Taught.

translation.text: From Plutarch's 'Whether Virtue Can Be Taught': In this essay, Plutarch examines this important aspect of the moral life with his characteristic combination of erudition, anecdote, and practical wisdom.
